title: rumex pulcher subsp. divaricatus
intro: Rumex pulcher subsp. divaricatus, also known as curly dock, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and wounds. The health benefits of Rumex pulcher subsp. divaricatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
